name: post
invariants: output.ok === true || typeof output.reason === 'string' || typeof output.error === 'string'
_note: post REQUIRES an authenticated actor (ctx.actor.userId); with no actor it returns ok:false reason:no_user. At most one OPEN lfg_request per (user, world) — a second post in the same world auto-cancels the first (pinned in lfg-domain-macros.test.js).
